caption: A man with glasses and a black t-shirt featuring a graphic design stands in front of a projector screen, likely giving a presentation or lecture. He is wearing a lanyard with an ID badge around his neck. Initially, he appears to be speaking while looking slightly downward, possibly reading from notes or addressing an audience. As the sequence progresses, he raises his right hand to his face, perhaps adjusting his glasses or gesturing to emphasize a point. The setting suggests an educational or professional environment, such as a classroom or conference room.
